name: @tacogips/google-speech-to-text-addon
description: Transcribe local audio with Google Cloud Speech-to-Text v1 long-running recognition.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: OAuth access token for Google Cloud Speech-to-Text and Cloud Storage. Provide one of GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN, GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS, or GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON; gcloud is used as a fallback token source when none is set.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
environmentVariables.description: Path to a Google service account credential JSON file able to upload to the target Cloud Storage bucket and run Speech-to-Text recognition. Alternative to GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON
environmentVariables.description: Inline Google service account credential JSON. Alternative to GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS.

capabilities.name: process.spawn
capabilities.reason: runs curl and node to upload audio, start long-running recognition, and poll the operation

capabilities.name: network.egress
capabilities.reason: uploads audio to Cloud Storage and calls speech.googleapis.com

capabilities.name: filesystem.read
capabilities.reason: reads the audio file submitted to Google Speech-to-Text

capabilities.name: filesystem.write
capabilities.reason: writes transcripts, captions, raw response, and output JSON

capabilities.name: env.read
capabilities.reason: reads explicit Google authentication environment bindings
